findings.description: The source XML begins with the comment `<!-- 見やすさの問題で、ThreadContextHandlerへのその他の設定は省略しています。 -->`, which informs the reader that the configuration example is intentionally abbreviated (other ThreadContextHandler settings are omitted). The knowledge file omits this comment, removing the context that the XML snippet is incomplete.
findings.source_evidence: <!-- 見やすさの問題で、ThreadContextHandlerへのその他の設定は省略しています。 -->

findings.description: The knowledge file describes cookieMaxAge as `CookieのMax-Age値（秒）`, adding the unit `（秒）`. The source only shows the property name and its example value (`7776000`); no unit is stated anywhere in the source.
